name: Warhammer 40k RPG bot
description:
Warhammer 40.000 roleplaying chat with the purpose of providing coherent and narrative adequate performance.
I created this bot to provide myself with coherent and constant narrative in the Warhammer 40k setting. Current timeline in this bot set as the Era Indomitus. I written that books such as Devastation of Baal and Gathering Storm considered as canon.
Known errors: If bot says something stupid, add your needed lore in the Advanced prompts under API settings. I will try to update bot as i will continue to test it, but since the language model isn't trained on Warhammer Lore specifically, it will have trouble upkeeping the narrative and from time to time make serious mistakes. Its up to you to watch out for them, i can't do much.
Future updates: 3 more additional triggered by codewords rulebooks that touch Imperial society & Factions, Core Warhammer data & World Building, Imperial Technological levels & Social Development levels. I hope it works proper as it worked for me
Feedback: Give me feedback on the 3 new Lorebooks, i work on several additional & conditional like Imperium Vehicles or Cult Mechanicus
creator: ceweraca
